mapper.sql: t.id, t.order_version_diff_id, t.order_version_id, t.field_name, t.field_label, t.before_value, t.after_value, t.change_category, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_version_diff t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_version_diff t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_version_id = #{params.orderVersionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_version_diff ( order_version_diff_id, order_version_id, field_name, field_label, before_value, after_value, change_category, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{orderVersionDiffId}, #{orderVersionId}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldLabel}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{changeCategory}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_version_diff ( order_version_diff_id, order_version_id, field_name, field_label, before_value, after_value, change_category, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.orderVersionDiffId}, #{item.orderVersionId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.fieldLabel}, #{item.beforeValue}, #{item.afterValue}, #{item.changeCategory}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE vso_order_version_diff t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
